MINISTRY OF LAW, JUSTICE AND COMPANY AFFAIRS New Delhi, the 20th August, 1998/Shravana 29, 1920 (Saka) The following Act of Parliament received the assent of1 the President on the 20th August, 1998, and is hereby published for general information:— THE GOVERNORS {EMOLUMENTS, ALLOWANCES AND PRIVILEGES) AMENDMENT ACT, 1998 No. 27 OF 1998 [20th August, 1998.] An Act further to amend the Governors (Emoluments, Allowances and Privileges) Act, 19S2. BE it enacted by Parliament in the Forty-ninth Year of the Republic of India as follows:— 1. This Ac\ may be called the Governors (Emoluments, Allowances and Privileges) Sborttick.
